# Amazon Q Developer User Guide - Document History

## Complete Document History (All Entries)

### Latest Updates (February 2026 - Present)

| Date | Change | Description |
|------|--------|-------------|
| **February 18, 2026** | Updated account limit for subscriptions | Maximum subscription increased from 10 to 20 accounts per AWS Region, per organization |
| **January 16, 2026** | Deprecated code transformation for GitLab | Java modernization code transformation deprecated for GitLab Duo; `/q transform` quick action and CI/CD pipeline customization documentation removed |
| **January 13, 2026** | Removed deprecated GitLab quick actions | Removed `/q dev (revise)` and Unit test generation `/q test` command from GitLab quick actions documentation |
| **December 29, 2025** | Updated GitHub feature development workflow | Now uses conversation-based feedback with `/q` command instead of traditional GitHub review process |
| **December 18, 2025** | Updated GitHub app installation registration | Updated steps for navigating Kiro and Amazon Q Developer shared console |
| **December 15, 2025** | Deprecated code transformation for GitHub | Java modernization code transformation deprecated for Amazon Q Developer for GitHub |
| **November 17, 2025** | Q CLI becomes Kiro CLI | Q CLI has been rebranded as Kiro CLI |

### October 2025 Updates

| Date | Change | Description |
|------|--------|-------------|
| **October 29, 2025** | Updated managed policies | Added permissions to: AmazonQFullAccess, AmazonQDeveloperAccess, AWSServiceRoleForUserSubscriptions |
| **October 21, 2025** | Removed IDE agent documentation | Agentic chat capabilities replaced `/dev`, `/doc/`, `/test`, `/review` agents; updated code review steps |
| **October 21, 2025** | Added IDE memory bank documentation | New documentation for generating memory banks for Amazon Q chat |
| **October 3, 2025** | Added Q CLI feature documentation | Documentation added for: agent creation with AI assistance, prompt management, message replies, project rules |

### September 2025 Updates

| Date | Change | Description |
|------|--------|-------------|
| **September 23, 2025** | Enhanced context management documentation | Added guidance on choosing right context approach with comparison tables, decision flowcharts, best practices |
| **September 18, 2025** | Added Q CLI v1.16.0 features | Agent default behavior, legacy MCP configuration support, new chat commands (`/tangent tail`, `/changelog`), agent settings |
| **September 17, 2025** | Context hooks deprecated | Deprecated in favor of agent hooks; existing configurations auto-migrated |
| **September 17, 2025** | Added remote MCP server support | Remote MCP servers with OAuth authentication and built-in tools configuration |
| **September 9, 2025** | Removed S3 bucket allowlist requirement | No longer need to allowlist S3 buckets for software development or unit test generation in IDE |
| **September 9, 2025** | New command line tool for transformation version | Latest version includes bug fixes |
| **September 2, 2025** | Updated GitHub review agent content | Code reviews now include summary with threaded findings |
| **September 2, 2025** | Added GitHub review prerequisites | Code reviews require Write, Maintain, or Admin role in GitHub |

### August 2025 Updates

| Date | Change | Description |
|------|--------|-------------|
| **August 21, 2025** | Disabling MCP | Organizations can now disable MCP |
| **August 19, 2025** | Updated proxy topic | Proxy Auto-Configuration (PAC) files are not supported |
| **August 15, 2025** | Updated deployment options | Maximum 10 accounts per AWS Region per organization |
| **August 15, 2025** | Added troubleshooting documentation | Comprehensive troubleshooting and log access/analysis guides |
| **August 7, 2025** | Added CLI transformation job history | `qct history` command documentation for viewing transformation job history |
| **August 6, 2025** | Added IDE transformation job history | Feature allows viewing, managing, retrieving artifacts from Java transformation jobs in VSCode |
| **August 5, 2025** | GitLab self-managed instance update | Requires GitLab 17.11.0 or later |
| **August 1, 2025** | Added code review steps for VSC | Procedures for running code reviews and addressing issues using agentic chat |

### July 2025 Updates

| Date | Change | Description |
|------|--------|-------------|
| **July 31, 2025** | Added model selection for IDE chat | New topic on selecting models for IDE chat |
| **July 31, 2025** | Added keyboard shortcuts topic | Comprehensive keyboard shortcuts across different IDEs and platforms |
| **July 31, 2025** | Added custom agents feature | Customize CLI for specific workflows by configuring tools, permissions, and context |
| **July 30, 2025** | Added chat history compaction topic | Managing context window limits when chatting in IDE |
| **July 24, 2025** | Added profile deletion topic | New documentation for deleting Amazon Q Developer profile |
| **July 21, 2025** | Added telemetry opt-out steps | Instructions for opting out of telemetry collection with transformation CLI |
| **July 16, 2025** | Added GitHub workflow for first-party dependencies | New page for handling first-party dependencies in code transformation |
| **July 15, 2025** | Updated user activity metrics | Additional metrics for inline chat feature |
| **July 15, 2025** | Updated proxy configuration | Instructions for Eclipse, JetBrains, and Visual Studio |
| **July 9, 2025** | Image context support in IDE chat | Users can include images in IDE chat prompts |

### June 2025 Updates

| Date | Change | Description |
|------|--------|-------------|
| **June 30, 2025** | Added slash commands for GitHub | `/q` commands for feature development, code reviews, code transformation, help |
| **June 26, 2025** | New content for project rules | Create project rules in GitLab and GitHub for standards/best practices |
| **June 25, 2025** | Updated KMS policy | Added `kms:Decrypt`, `kms:DescribeKey`, `kms:Encrypt`, `kms:GenerateDataKey` permissions |
| **June 25, 2025** | Added proxy configuration instructions | VSCode proxy configuration section |
| **June 24, 2025** | Updated user activity reports | Generated at midnight UTC; split into 1,000 user files |
| **June 24, 2025** | Updated S3 bucket section | VSCode plugin v1.72.0+ doesn't require bucket allowlisting |
| **June 24, 2025** | Rebranded operational investigations | Renamed "Amazon Q Developer operational investigations" to "CloudWatch investigations" |
| **June 19, 2025** | Updated GitHub feature/transformation details | Invokable via slash commands in issue comments |
| **June 18, 2025** | Added Rules button to VS Code | Creating/managing project rules through UI |
| **June 18, 2025** | Added context pinning in VS Code | Maintain selected context items across chat interactions |
| **June 17, 2025** | Updated code transformation details | Added source/target code version information; additional upgrade requirements |
| **June 17, 2025** | Chat about network security | New capability to chat about network security in console and chat apps |
| **June 13, 2025** | Added data storage topic | Information about content storage locations |
| **June 12, 2025** | MCP in the IDE | MCP servers now usable with Amazon Q in IDE |
| **June 11, 2025** | Builder ID upgrade | Builder ID users can upgrade to Pro tier |
| **June 9, 2025** | Updated subscription statuses | Clarified "Unavailable" status description |
| **June 9, 2025** | Dependency support for CLI transformations | Can provide dependency upgrade file and modify transformation plan |
| **June 9, 2025** | Expanded command line reference | New command reference section with argument details |
| **June 5, 2025** | Model selection for CLI chat | Users can select model for command-line chat sessions |
| **June 5, 2025** | Context support expansion | JetBrains, Visual Studio, Eclipse IDE chat context support |
| **June 5, 2025** | Agentic chat in all IDEs | Available in all supported IDEs |
| **June 2, 2025** | Cost optimization in chat | Chat for cost optimization insights beyond cost analysis |
| **June 2, 2025** | Updated GitHub code reviews | Code reviews within pull requests using `/q review` slash command |

### May 2025 Updates

| Date | Change | Description |
|------|--------|-------------|
| **May 22, 2025** | Updated firewall page | Added/updated URLs for firewall, proxy, data perimeter configuration |
| **May 21, 2025** | MCP configuration commands | Commands to configure MCP servers from command line |
| **May 15, 2025** | Updated troubleshooting | More information on subscription troubleshooting |
| **May 15, 2025** | Updated code review behavior | Triggered on new/reopened GitLab MRs and GitHub PRs; not on subsequent commits |
| **May 15, 2025** | Updated VPC endpoints | VPC endpoint updates |
| **May 15, 2025** | Improved MCP loading | MCP servers load in background; immediate interaction possible |
| **May 15, 2025** | Added image support in chat | Analyze/discuss images using `fs_read` tool with Image mode |
| **May 15, 2025** | Added conversation persistence | Auto-remembers conversations by directory; `/export`/`/import` commands |
| **May 14, 2025** | Updated managed policies | Added permissions for conversation history to AmazonQFullAccess and AmazonQDeveloperAccess |
| **May 14, 2025** | Multiple conversations in console | Save and switch between conversations in AWS console |
| **May 13, 2025** | Added subscription details | Information on IAM Identity Center and profile installation locations |
| **May 12, 2025** | Transformation website removed | Amazon Q Developer transformation website taken down |
| **May 10, 2025** | Updated terminology | "identity-aware console sessions" to "identity-enhanced console sessions" |
| **May 8, 2025** | Example SCP added | Service control policy denying access outside EU regions |

### April 2025 Updates

| Date | Change | Description |
|------|--------|-------------|
| **April 30, 2025** | Customizations language support | Support for C++ and C# |
| **April 30, 2025** | Updated managed policies | Added permissions to AmazonQFullAccess, GitLabDuoWithAmazonQPermissionsPolicy, and plugin configuration policies |
| **April 29, 2025** | Added MCP support | MCP support in CLI |
| **April 28, 2025** | Added upgrade details | Free tier to Pro tier upgrade information |
| **April 21, 2025** | Conversation history support | Chat conversations saved in IDE |
| **April 21, 2025** | Code as context | Classes, functions, global variables as IDE chat context |
| **April 16, 2025** | GitLab Duo updates | Updated onboarding and permissions policy |
| **April 15, 2025** | Updated dashboard permissions | List of permissions required for dashboard viewing |
| **April 13, 2025** | Improved security documentation | Reorganized command-line security documentation |
| **April 12, 2025** | Enhanced settings | New command-line settings section and tool permissions documentation |
| **April 10, 2025** | Updated subscription workflow | Moved from Amazon Q console to Amazon Q Developer console |
| **April 10, 2025** | Inline chat in Eclipse | Inline chat available in Eclipse |
| **April 10, 2025** | Europe (Frankfurt) region support | Profiles available in Europe (Frankfurt) |
| **April 10, 2025** | `/tools` feature | Command to manage tool permissions |
| **April 9, 2025** | Natural language support | Chat in languages other than English (IDE and CLI) |
| **April 8, 2025** | GitLab Duo updates | Changes to inline policy, optional CMK policy; removed `/fix` feature |
| **April 8, 2025** | Email notifications | Email notifications for transformation updates |
| **April 4, 2025** | New context/prompt/rules topics | Added topics for context, prompt library, project rules |

### March 2025 Updates

| Date | Change | Description |
|------|--------|-------------|
| **March 25, 2025** | Example policy update | Added `sso:CreateInstance` permission to admin policies |
| **March 20, 2025** | Customization language support | C++ and C# in customizations |
| **March 13, 2025** | Updated chat about resources | Chat with multiple AWS resources/services |
| **March 12, 2025** | Documentation generation languages | C++ and C# support for `/doc` generation |
| **March 6, 2025** | Subscription limit | Maximum 50 AWS accounts per organization |
| **March 6, 2025** | CLI context integration | Enhanced context for more relevant responses |

### February 2025 and Earlier

| Date | Change | Description |
|------|--------|-------------|
| **February 28, 2025** | New transformation CLI version | Support for IAM authentication via AWS CLI |
| **February 25, 2025** | Pro tier upgrade info | Upgrade information in Free tier topic |
| **February 25, 2025** | Customizations policy update | Permission added to customizations policy |
| **February 21, 2025** | New dashboard topic | Dashboard usage metrics descriptions |
| **February 21, 2025** | Cross-region processing topic | New topic on cross-region request processing |
| **February 21, 2025** | Managed policy update | Permissions added to AWSServiceRoleForUserSubscriptions |
| **February 20, 2025** | `/doc` enhancement | Infrastructure diagram generation |
| **February 19, 2025** | New subscription topics | Subscription statuses and aggregated subscriptions |
| **February 19, 2025** | Chat applications chapter | Rebranded and new supported features chapter |
| **February 14, 2025** | Java 21 support | Upgrade Java to Java 21 (IDE and CLI) |
| **January 31, 2025** | Customizations update | Unlimited repositories in customizations |
| **January 24, 2025** | Prompt logging examples | Example logs for prompt logging |
| **January 23, 2025** | CloudZero plugin | Available in Amazon Q chat |
| **January 15, 2025** | User activity metrics | New metrics added |
| **December 16, 2024** | Dashboard update | Removed old dashboard info; added filters/metrics |
| **December 13, 2024** | Troubleshooting capability | New troubleshooting resources section |
| **December 6, 2024** | Identity-enhanced sessions | Clarified enablement instructions |
| **December 3, 2024** | Test generation agent | Unit test generation feature |
| **December 3, 2024** | Large-scale transformation | .NET, mainframe, VMware bulk transformation |
| **December 3, 2024** | GitLab Duo with Amazon Q | Complete integration documentation |
| **December 3, 2024** | Documentation generation | README generation in IDE |
| **December 3, 2024** | Code reviews in IDE | Issue detection and addressing |
| **December 3, 2024** | .NET transformation | .NET to Linux-compatible applications (VSCode, preview) |
| **November 27, 2024** | Transformation on CLI | Command-line Java transformation (preview) |
| **November 27, 2024** | Multiple diffs | Transformation changes in multiple diffs |
| **November 27, 2024** | Eclipse support | Amazon Q plugin in Eclipse (preview) |
| **November 26, 2024** | Cost analysis GA | Generally available (was preview) |
| **November 22, 2024** | Embedded SQL transformation | Convert embedded SQL in Java |
| **April 30, 2024** | GA Release | Amazon Q Developer generally available |
| **November 28, 2023** | Preview release | Initial preview release |
